raw_consumer_statement:
My XXXX Citi card was used on XX/XX/scrub>XXXX  for XXXX fraud charges. 

Citi card and I detected the fraud charges on XX/XX/year> and the Citi credit card was cancelled and replaced. 

On XX/XX/year> I received my monthly Citi credit card statement and 8 of the fraud charges were listed there to be paid. I called Citi multiple times to resolve this issue and was told the fraud charges were still pending. 

Citi is in violation of there own Citi XXXX liability policy and not following the FCBA requirements. These include withholding payment on the disputed amount and related charges during the investigation. 

Thank you
